description: Pseudonymizes PII before your LLM and returns a cryptographically signed receipt per response.
name: io.github.Declade/lucairn-mcp-server

environmentVariables.description: Lucairn gateway API key (lcr_live_*). Issued at https://lucairn.eu/account/keys. Free tier requires BYOK upstream LLM keys (ANTHROPIC_API_KEY or OPENAI_API_KEY).
environmentVariables.name: LUCAIRN_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Upstream Anthropic API key. Used when the requested model is claude-* / anthropic-*. Required if you call Claude models on the free tier (BYOK).
environmentVariables.name: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Upstream OpenAI API key. Used when the requested model routes to OpenAI. Required if you call OpenAI models on the free tier (BYOK).
environmentVariables.name: OPENAI_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Override the gateway URL. Defaults to https://gateway.lucairn.eu (production). Set this to point at a self-hosted Lucairn deployment.
environmentVariables.name: LUCAIRN_BASE_URL

environmentVariables.description: Transport mode for the MCP server. One of 'direct-http' (default; v1.1+ behavior) or 'stdio-bridge' (v1.2+ opt-in).
environmentVariables.name: LUCAIRN_TRANSPORT
